title: Byss (disambiguation)
content:
'''Byss''' can refer to:
*[[Byss/Legends|Byss]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].
*[[Byss (Abyssin)|Byss]], a planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
*[[Byss (star)|Byss]], a star in the [[Abyss system]].

{{Disambig}}
